data.body:
PASS 1 review — [T3] Integration feasibility (overlay): PASS / not-applicable.

This plan integrates only internal, already-used surfaces — no new external API/CLI/service/library and no asserted-but-unverified capability:
- `fetcher.fetch_snapshot` exists (src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/fetcher.py:480).
- `FakeAcliClient` already exists in-repo (tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/_fakes.py:30), built by story A.
- inbound_differ / outbound_differ / applier are existing internal modules in the reconciler package.
- JSON Schema validation via `jsonschema` is a core runtime dependency (pyproject.toml:40 `jsonschema>=4.18`) and is used pervasively (e.g. src/rebar/schemas/__init__.py:316). TypedDict is stdlib.

Per the T3 overlay's own scoping ("an internal, already-used integration is not-applicable"), no integration-feasibility findings apply. No SPIKE warranted.
